channel.title: 会员服务 | Membership Services on 北京数字健康研究会 | Beijing Digital Health Research Institute
channel.description: Recent content in 会员服务 | Membership Services on 北京数字健康研究会 | Beijing Digital Health Research Institute

item.title: 会员权益 | Member Benefits
item.description:
会员权益 | Member Benefits

个人会员权益 | Individual Member Benefits

中文：

  1. 学术交流 — 免费参加研究会组织的学术会议、研讨会
  2. 信息发布 — 在研究会网站和公众号发布研究成果
  3. 资源共享 — 获取研究会内部资料和研究报告
  4. 培训机会 — 优先参加专业培训和继续教育
  5. 荣誉评选 — 参与优秀会员、优秀论文等评选
  6. 咨询服务 — 获得数字健康领域专业咨询

English:

  1. Academic Exchange — Free participation in academic conferences and seminars
  2. Information Publishing — Publish research results on the Institute’s website and WeChat
  3. Resource Sharing — Access to internal materials and research reports
  4. Training Opportunities — Priority for professional training and continuing education
  5. Honor Selection — Participate in outstanding member and paper selections
  6. Consultation Services — Professional consultation in digital health

单位会员权益 | Institutional Member Benefits

  • 单位负责人自动成为研究会理事

item.title: 入会申请 | Membership Application
item.description:
入会申请 | Membership Application

入会条件 | Eligibility

个人会员 | Individual Members:

  • 从事数字健康相关领域工作

  • 具有中级以上职称或同等专业水平

  • 承认研究会章程

  • 自愿申请加入

  • Engaged in digital health related fields

  • Intermediate or higher professional title

  • Acknowledge the Institute’s charter

  • Apply voluntarily

单位会员 | Institutional Members:

  • 从事数字健康相关业务的企事业单位

  • 具有良好的社会信誉

  • 承认研究会章程

  • 自愿申请加入

  • Enterprises and institutions in digital health

  • Good social reputation

  • Acknowledge the Institute’s charter

  • Apply voluntarily

入会流程 | Application Process

  1. 在线申请 | Online Application

    • 填写入会申请表
    • 提交相关证明材料

  2. 资格审核 | Qualification Review

    • 秘书处审核申请材料
    • 理事会审议批准

  3. 缴纳会费 | Pay Membership Fee
